intro_body: A tiny modular snake engine is waking up. Content comes from JSON. Controls work across desktop and touch.
intro_skip: Press any key, click, or tap to skip
menu_hint: ENTER/SPACE to confirm, click or tap to select
back_hint: Press any key, click, or tap to return
story_continue: Press any key, click, or tap to begin
story_skip: Press any key, click, or tap to finish text
stats_ready: Press any key / click / tap to continue
continue_hint: Press any key, click, or tap to continue
game_over_body: Press confirm to retry the run. Any other input returns to menu.
game_over_hint: ENTER/SPACE retries. Other input returns to menu.
food_good_description: Good packet. Collect all of them.
food_bad_description: Bad packet. Costs score and life.
food_relay_orb_description: Charged relay core. Collect them all.
food_glitch_mine_description: A volatile trap packet. Avoid contact.
level_1_description: Collect every good packet while avoiding static.
level_1_story: Welcome to the training circuit. Collect every bright signal fruit to stabilize the feed. Blue static nodes are corrupted data. Touch them and you lose both score and one precious life.
level_2_description: A larger field with heavier corruption.
level_2_story: The first channel is stable. Now push through the relay tunnel, where more corrupted nodes drift through the stream. The grid is wider, the noise is denser, and the feed only clears when every good packet is secured.
level_2_quote_2: You are still ahead of the corruption.
